evals.name: training-run-asks-naming
evals.prompt: I want to run an ablation study comparing two learning rates (1e-3 and 1e-4) for a small LSTM on Penn Treebank. I'll use 2 GPUs on a Slurm cluster. /gen-draft
evals.expected_output: draft.md exists AND contains a run naming template in Constraints, AND the AskUserQuestion tool was called to ask which categories to include in the run name.

assertions.name: draft_file_created
assertions.description: draft.md was written to the project root

assertions.name: run_naming_in_constraints
assertions.description: The Constraints section of draft.md contains a concrete run directory naming template (e.g., '{model}_{params}_...' or a filled example)

assertions.name: askuserquestion_called
assertions.description: The AskUserQuestion tool was invoked during the skill execution to ask about run naming categories

evals.name: non-training-task-no-naming-question
evals.prompt: I want to parse a folder of PDF invoices and extract totals into a CSV. /gen-draft
evals.expected_output: draft.md exists. AskUserQuestion about run naming is NOT called (not a training task). Inputs, Outputs, Execution Order all present.

assertions.name: no_unnecessary_naming_question
assertions.description: AskUserQuestion is NOT called for run directory naming (this is a data-processing task, not an experiment run)

assertions.name: execution_order_tagged
assertions.description: Every step in Execution Order has either [independent] or [depends: N] tag

evals.name: naming-already-in-conversation
evals.prompt: Run an MQAR ablation: DeltaNetSST with theta=0.001 and theta=0.1, batch size 32 and 64, on 4x GB200 GPUs with Slurm. Run names should follow 'model_theta_bs_4xgb200_nodeXX_jYYYY' format. /gen-draft
evals.expected_output: draft.md contains the naming template the user already specified (model_theta_bs_4xgb200_nodeXX_jYYYY). AskUserQuestion for naming is NOT re-asked because the user already gave the format.

assertions.name: user_format_preserved
assertions.description: Constraints section contains the user-specified format 'model_theta_bs_4xgb200_nodeXX_jYYYY'

assertions.name: no_redundant_question
assertions.description: AskUserQuestion for run naming is NOT called since the user already specified the format
